affected_pattern: Small cohort of customers on metered tethering show 10x usage with no change in primary-device usage
root_cause: Tethering cap bypass defect — a UE OS update allowed tethered traffic to be tagged as primary-device traffic in the APN header, bypassing the tethering-metered rate that applied the cap.
supporting_evidence: Usage Spike RCA Playbook: Tethering-Tag Bypass pattern
Device OS version common across affected customers
Deep-packet inspection confirms tethered flows lacking the tethering-tag
recommended_action: Deploy PGW rule to reclassify flows by TTL/user-agent heuristics
Issue partial credit for mis-classified overage
Engage device OEM regarding the OS behavior change
Add metric: tethering-tag presence per APN; alert on drop
